name: Skills Manager
description: Monitors and orchestrates the 28-skill evidence retrieval pipeline. Tracks skill health, coverage, performance benchmarks, evidence diversity, and MedCPT reranker status. Provides recommendations for skill configuration.

provider.organization: Bayer AG — LLM Council Agent Team

skills.name: Skill Health Monitoring
skills.description: Tracks which of the 22 evidence skills (11 core + 11 web) returned results, which failed silently, and provides coverage metrics.

skills.name: Evidence Diversity Analysis
skills.description: Analyses citation source types, identifies single-source concentrations, and recommends enabling web search for broader coverage.

skills.name: Performance Benchmarking
skills.description: Monitors per-skill latency, identifies bottleneck skills, and tracks MedCPT neural reranker availability.

skills.name: Skill Registry
skills.description: Maintains canonical registry of all 22 skills with IDs, citation tags, and types (core/web). Used for health checks and coverage calculations.
